drivers.label: Enterprise adoption
drivers.detail: AI deployment is spreading faster than public labor statistics can fully register.

drivers.label: Capability spread
drivers.detail: Benchmarks keep improving on tasks that map onto real computer and knowledge work.

drivers.label: Institutional friction
drivers.detail: Regulation, trust, and operational drag still keep midnight farther away.

summary: The clock advances through accumulation, not prophecy. Adoption pressure and labor-market signals are moving faster than regulation.
